props.name: selected
props.docs: Choose if the component is selected or not

events.docs: Emits when the breadcrumb is active

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-arrow-depth-color
styles.docs: Sets the color of the arrow icon that separates buttons

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-background
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-background-hover
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-background-selected
styles.docs: Sets the background color of the button when it's active

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-color
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-color-hover
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-button-color-selected
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the button when it's active

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-outline-blur
styles.docs: Sets the blur color when the button is blurred via keyboard

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-outline-blur-offset
styles.docs: Sets the blur offset color when the button is blurred via keyboard

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-outline-focus
styles.docs: Sets the focus color when the button is focused via keyboard

styles.name: --mds-breadcrumb-item-outline-focus-offset
styles.docs: Sets the focus offset color when the button is focused via keyboard
